---
name: Node pack proposal
about: Propose new nodes (the best way to contribute!)
labels: node-pack
---

**What domain / library** (e.g. time series with statsmodels, audio with librosa)


**The nodes** (name → inputs → outputs, one line each)
- e.g. `ARIMA Forecast`: dataset → dataset (adds forecast column)

**Heavy dependencies?** (would this be a lazy pack, and roughly how big)


**Are you up for implementing it?** (see CONTRIBUTING.md, a node is about 20 lines, and we will help)
